risk_note.tr: Risk yok. Disk I/O yuksek olabilir, baska is yaparken yavasligi hissedersiniz.
risk_note.en: No risk. High disk I/O may cause sluggishness during scan.

body.tr: Settings > Privacy & Security > Windows Security > Virus & threat protection > 'Scan options' > 'Full scan' > 'Scan now'.
body.en: Settings > Privacy & Security > Windows Security > Virus & threat protection > 'Scan options' > 'Full scan' > 'Scan now'.

steps.command: Get-MpThreatDetection | Select-Object DomainUser, InitialDetectionTime, Resources, ThreatID

body.tr: Defender otomatik quarantine yapar. Manuel temizlik: Settings > Virus & threat protection > 'Protection history' > tehdit > 'Actions' > Remove. Sonra tekrar tarama yap.
body.en: Defender auto-quarantines. Manual cleanup: Settings > Virus & threat protection > 'Protection history' > threat > 'Actions' > Remove. Then re-scan.
